subject: 20 Units | Townhome Portfolio | Luxury & Efficiency
text:
The CR12 and Cedarwood Townhomes portfolio presents a rare opportunity to acquire a highly differentiated, large-format suburban rental community in Coon Rapids, Minnesota. The portfolio combines a fully renovated “missing middle” asset with a boutique luxury build-to-rent community—collectively offering 20 townhome units ranging from approximately 2,500+ to 3,300+ square feet. CR12 Townhomes delivers spacious, multi-level layouts with modernized interiors, attached two-car garages, and flexible living spaces—positioned to capture strong demand for affordable alternatives to single-family housing. Cedarwood Townhomes complements the portfolio with a high-end, design-forward product featuring 4+ bedroom residences, premium finishes, private garages with EV capability, and a fully amenitized courtyard environment designed to replicate single-family living. Located in a supply-constrained suburban submarket, both properties benefit from limited comparable inventory, strong renter demand, and
convenient access to major commuter corridors connecting to the Twin Cities. The portfolio offers investors a turnkey, stabilized investment with durable competitive advantages driven by unit size, product differentiation, and long-term tenant retention—while also providing scalability through a proven suburban townhome model.

Listing Agent
Cody Smith
Robert Dulin

* Large-format townhomes with expansive layouts
* Renovated and luxury build-to-rent mix
* 2,500+ to 3,300+ unit square footage
* Attached two-car garages with storage and convenience
* Limited supply in high-demand submarket
* Strong tenant retention and long-term demand
* Well-connected to major employment centers across the Twin Cities metro
